name: l2_powered_cruise_experiment_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseExperimentPlan pairs forward-flight static-airframe force/moment requests with cruise actuator-disk source targets.
note: Reference surface for the A4MC L2 powered-cruise experiment plan.

name: l2_actuator_disk_load
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskCalibration supplies cruise spin pressure jump induced velocity edgewise advance and Reynolds targets.
note: Reference surface for cruise actuator disk source strength.

name: l2_actuator_disk_source_map
value: Aerodynamics4McL2ActuatorDiskSourceMap supplies per-rotor force and moment source vectors for cruise spin.
note: Reference surface for per-rotor powered source target geometry.

name: l2_bridge
value: Aerodynamics4McL2Bridge can build and run static L2 force/moment requests but does not expose powered source-term injection.
note: Bridge capability boundary for powered cruise source validation.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future edgewise powered source-term force and moment validation.
note: Upstream live CFD target for future powered cruise validation.
